text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Prepared to wield her completely unrestrained
emotions, Yaeno Muteki heads off to the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her rivals, who have now witnessed her overcome
the trials of her past, are eager to see how the
new and improved Yaeno Muteki fares in a race.
